M3GAN (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $95,159,005Details
International Box Office $86,637,512
Worldwide Box Office $181,796,517
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,163,795
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,964,740
Total $4,128,535
Further financial details...

Synopsis

M3GAN is a marvel of artificial intelligence, a life-like doll programmed to be a child’s greatest companion and a parent’s greatest ally. Designed by brilliant toy-company roboticist Gemma, M3GAN can listen and watch and learn as she becomes friend and teacher, playmate and protector, for the child she is bonded to. When Gemma suddenly becomes the caretaker of her orphaned 8-year-old niece, Cady, Gemma’s unsure and unprepared to be a parent. Under intense pressure at work, Gemma decides to pair her M3GAN prototype with Cady in an attempt to resolve both problems—a decision that will have unimaginable consequences.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,429,860 (32.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 15.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,509 opening theaters/3,628 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $104,031,237

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 6th, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
April 30th, 2025 (Special Engagement) by Universal

January 4th, 2023 (Wide) (Spain)
Video Release: January 24th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violent content and terror, some strong language and a suggestive reference.
(Rating bulletin 2756 (cert #54108), 11/2/2022)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Franchise: M3GAN
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): New Zealand, United States
Plot point: Car Accident, Death of a Sibling, Robot, Unexpected Families, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Atomic Monster, Blumhouse, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

M3GAN is a marvel of artificial intelligence, a life-like doll programmed to be a child’s greatest companion and a parent’s greatest ally. Designed by brilliant toy-company roboticist Gemma, M3GAN can listen and watch and learn as she becomes friend and teacher, playmate and protector, for the child she is bonded to. When Gemma suddenly becomes the caretaker of her orphaned 8-year-old niece, Cady, Gemma’s unsure and unprepared to be a parent. Under intense pressure at work, Gemma decides to pair her M3GAN prototype with Cady in an attempt to resolve both problems—a decision that will have unimaginable consequences.
